---
title: "CV"
---

[Download my CV](files/Almeida_CV.pdf){.button}

## Current Position

Pre-Doctoral Fellow, Nova SBE, 2025-2026.

I work under the supervision of Professor Pedro S. Martins on labour topics, supporting research projects through literature reviews, data cleaning, data analysis, and drafting. I am affiliated with the Nova Public Policy Institute and the Economics of Education Knowledge Center.

## Education

- MSc in Economics, FEP, University of Porto, 2021-2023.
- Exchange semester, Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich.
- BSc in Management, DEGEIT, University of Aveiro, 2018-2021.

## Research Experience

- Pre-Doctoral Fellow, Nova SBE, Lisbon.
- Intern and Consultant, International Labour Organization, Geneva.
- Master's thesis: "Regional Labour Market Concentration and Wages: Evidence from Portugal."

## Skills

- Administrative microdata: employer-employee longitudinal data, firm accounting data, public employment services data, and education data.
- Software: Stata, Python, LaTeX.
- Languages: Portuguese, English.
